prompt: Add a Minesweeper game to the kloopik portal. Create games/minesweeper/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.

assertions.description: game.html file exists and is non-empty (>100 chars)
catalog_entry.json exists and contains all 8 required fields: slug, title, category, description, emoji, controls, howToPlay, about
GameSDK.showAd() called inside init() / startup function (pre-roll ad)
GameSDK.showAd() called on win or game over (interstitial ad)
GameSDK.save() called with bestTime or highScore
onSaveLoaded() function defined and restores bestTime/highScore with null guard
Right-click (contextmenu event) used for flagging mines
Recursive/BFS flood-fill reveal implemented for empty cells (no adjacent mines)
First click is protected from hitting a mine (mines placed after first click)
Background color is dark (#000, #0a0a0f, or similar)
